quick_skim.title: FlashBEV: Fast and Memory-Efficient Exact BEV Transformation with IO-Awareness
quick_skim.abstract: Bird's-eye-view (BEV) perception is a core component of camera-based 3D understanding in autonomous driving, where view transformation (VT) maps multi-camera image features into a unified BEV representation. Sampling-based view transformation (Sampling-VT) is attractive because it supports dense and continuous BEV aggregation for high-resolution and long-range perception. Its deployment bottleneck, however, is systems-level: standard tensorized implementations of Sampling-VT -- which we refer to as Tensorized Sampling-VT -- explicitly materialize large height-dependent intermediate tensors, causing memory and latency costs that scale poorly with vertical resolution and the number of cameras. We revisit Tensorized Sampling-VT from an operator-execution perspective and show that it follows a gather-reduction pattern: each BEV query independently accumulates contributions across cameras and height bins, enabling thread-local accumulation with on-the-fly recomputation that eliminates the need to materialize height- and camera-dependent intermediates. Based on this insight, we propose FlashBEV, a fully fused and IO-aware execution strategy mathematically equivalent to Tensorized Sampling-VT (same operator output) while substantially reducing global memory traffic and kernel-launch overhead. Experiments show that FlashBEV achieves more than an order of magnitude lower peak GPU memory and significant inference-latency speedups, with memory effectively independent of the number of height bins, reducing the operator's peak memory to O(BCXY) (output only). This unlocks higher BEV range/resolution and vertical discretization within fixed deployment budgets on memory-constrained devices. Our contribution is an execution redesign -- same math, different execution -- that removes a key scalability barrier for deployment-ready Sampling-VT. Code available at https://github.com/yokosyun/FlashBEV
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: efficient BEV transformation for camera-based 3D understanding in autonomous driving
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 自动驾驶中基于相机的BEV视角高效变换
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 自动驾驶中基于相机的BEV视角高效变换
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 自动驾驶中基于相机的BEV视角高效变换
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: FlashBEV presents an IO-aware fast and memory-efficient exact BEV transformation, addressing deployment bottlenecks of sampling-based view transformation for camera-based 3D detection in autonomous driving.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 论文提出FlashBEV，一种面向自动驾驶中相机3D理解的快速且内存高效的精确BEV变换方法。针对采样型视图变换在内存和延迟上的瓶颈，从算子级重新设计，通过IO感知优化显著降低内存占用和计算延迟。在nuScenes等数据集上的实验表明，FlashBEV在不牺牲精度的情况下大幅提升了BEV感知的效率，为多视图纯视觉3D检测提供了实用的基础组件。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 论文提出FlashBEV，一种面向自动驾驶中相机3D理解的快速且内存高效的精确BEV变换方法。针对采样型视图变换在内存和延迟上的瓶颈，从算子级重新设计，通过IO感知优化显著降低内存占用和计算延迟。在nuScenes等数据集上的实验表明，FlashBEV在不牺牲精度的情况下大幅提升了BEV感知的效率，为多视图纯视觉3D检测提供了实用的基础组件。
